title: KSOU Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: KSOU Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Karnataka State Open University Result 2026 declared for 1st and 2nd semester MA, MSc and Nutrition courses (October/November 2025 exams) on the official website - ksouportal.com on 27-03-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the KSOU result.

content.text: Karnataka State Open University has released the KSOU Result 2026 for multiple postgraduate and diploma programmes from the October/November 2025 examination session, including fresh and repeater candidates. The latest update covers I Semester MSc Clinical Nutrition and Dietetics, I Semester MA Hindi, II Semester MSc Biotechnology, II Semester MA Kannada provisional revaluation results along with Nutrition and Health Education (DNHE) and PG Diploma/Certificate in Nutrition and Dietetics (PGCND) provisional results for the 2024-25 cycles. KSOU Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - ksouportal.com.

Students can check and download their KSOU revaluation and regular results by visiting the official result portal, selecting the correct programme, semester and cycle and then entering their enrollment or registration number to view the marks. After accessing the online marks statement, learners must carefully verify personal details, internal and theory marks, revaluation changes (if any) and overall result status and contact the Registrar Evaluation or KSOU academic platform in case of discrepancies, especially related to internal assessment.

KSOU has published a set of provisional revaluation and regular results for various PG and diploma programmes under the 2024-25 January and July cycles, giving distance learners clarity on their updated marks after revaluation. These results are hosted on the dedicated KSOU result portal where students can securely log in with their credentials and download their provisional mark statements for future use.

Karnataka State Open University has activated a common online result portal through which students can access all MSc, MA, DNHE and PGCND October/November 2025 results declared on 27 March 2026. Using the same link, learners can choose their programme and semester to view either provisional revaluation results or provisional regular results for the respective cycle.

content.text: Use the steps below to check and download your KSOU Result 2026 for MA, MSc, DNHE and PGCND courses:

items: Visit the official KSOU result portal: https://ksouportal.com/results/ksouresult.aspx.
On the result page, select your programme/course (for example, MSc Clinical Nutrition and Dietetics, MA Hindi, MSc Biotechnology, MA Kannada, DNHE or PGCND).
Choose the relevant semester, cycle (2024-25 January or July Cycle) and exam session (EXAM OCT/NOV - 2025) from the available options, if provided.
Enter your Enrollment Number / Registration Number / Roll Number and any other details asked, such as date of birth or security code.
Click on Submit / Get Result / View Result to display your provisional result or provisional revaluation result on the screen.
Check your personal details, internal assessment marks, theory/practical marks, revaluation status and overall result status, then download or print the result for future reference.
